feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issue with My Inbox app in SAP BTP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am using below documentation to create destination for sap_process_automation_service to update the my inbox app in the build workzone

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-configure-workzone.html

But now the endpoints.api is not even present in service key, please guide which URL to use in my destination to bring MyInbox app in Build workzone. Instead of endpoints.api we have endpoints.poral-service now.

I used same but the apps are not appearing in content provider.

entry.title: No correct display from Fiori in SAP Build Work Zone Advanced Edition
entry.content:
Hello

I have add a content from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to a SAP Build Work Zone Advanced Edition. All Fiori are get this structure in the Work Zone application area, after you go over the tiles in. The html/gui application from SAP S/4HANA Cloud working normale.

For both I get the correct data from backend system. But only the all Fiori display this in that overview.

entry.title: SAP build Workzone content federation from S/4 HANA on-premise
entry.content:
I checked SAP's documentation on content federation from on-premise system (SAP S/4 HANA) and exposure is based on roles. Is there a way to expose users on-premise Fiori launchpad's personalization data to Build workzone as Launchpad personalization is not captured in roles?

Thanks.

entry.title: Change the Company navigation tab menu order
entry.content:
Hi,

Can I move the Company menu nav tabs from the beginning of the menu to the last position?

I would like to have as first entry the Areas nav tabs (based on users roles) and as latest the Company nav tabs


Is it possible also to create a workbook without having it visible as nav tab?

Regards
Marco

entry.title: UI Integartion card chart and table data in single card
entry.content:
Hi All,

our requirement develop the UI integration cards and deploy into BTP workzone site.

when we go through the card explorer documentation, there are predefined templates(Example: list card, analytical card, table card).

But there are no standard templates available in documentation for different types of templates in single card.

How can we show both the chart and table data in single UI integration card ? Is it possible ?

entry.title: Prerequisite to configure SSO in S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need to do SSO configuration for one of our customer in S/4HANA Private Cloud, so request you to please share us the prerequisites and step by step process flow design architecture.

We found a blog for SSO in SAP official site but which is not given in detail, please share with screens if you have any.

I am also sharing the blog which is available but need more information for SSO configuration with screenshots.

https://blogs.sap.com/2022/01/14/a-single-sign-on-guide-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition-rise-with-sap/

Thanks,
Balasubramanyam.

entry.title: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation. Try again.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting error "Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation. Try again.". There is no detail available. Please help to resolve this issue. I am using a trial BTP account.

Thanks & Regards,

Bhargav D

entry.title: How to implement sorting and filtering options for UI Integration cards
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to implement sorting and filtering options for table card with external buttons on UI integartion cards.

Post development of these cards we are accessing from BTP workzone site.

In the below blog in step5 it is showing as dropdown for filter option.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/appstudio-sapui5-integrationcard-create.html

Instead of dropdown for filter can we show with external button or any table column level sorting, filtering features available for these UI integration cards like our UI5 applications ?

entry.title: How to use work zone with successfactors preview, develop, production instance?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

My company purchased Work Zone advanced edition.

I am currently setting up the work zone with a successfactors development instance and doing development.

After I finish development, I want to set up a preview and production instance as well.

Do I need to create a BTP subaccount for work zone for each instance and proceed with work zone onbording?

Or should I remove the current work zone from the SFSF development instance and configure it again on another instance?

I would like to know how others use work zones for development, preview, and production phases.

Regards,

Leo

entry.title: When will Mobile Start be available for SAP SuccessFactors WorkZone (WorkZone Advanced) ?
entry.content: We need to take a decision on the way to go for a mobile app to access our SAP SucessFactors Workzone platform. When will this type of WorkZone (&Launchpad) be available on SAP Mobile Start?

entry.title: Maximum number of external user on SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone?
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently we are implementing SAP SF Work Zone with external user activated. We are just curious whether there is a maximum number of external user on SAP SF Work Zone

Thankyou

entry.title: SF Recruiting Contract Creation using SAP BTP, SAP BPA & SF Work Zone
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'm looking for insights into a scenario which I'm currently tackling with my client. As we are endeavoring to create contracts for candidates using SF Recruiting by leveraging SAP BTP, and SAP BPA, with SAP SF Work Zone for HR.

Appreciate it if you could share your knowledge & experience on the possibilities and challenges concerning this task? Specifically, I'd be keen to understand:

1. The feasible ways to integrate SAP BTP, SAP BPA, and SF Work Zone for HR for contract creation in SuccessFactors Recruiting.

2. Potential complexities or challenges that we might confront during the integration process.

3. Any solutions or workarounds that can simplify the process, improve efficiency, or mitigate probable issues.

4. How are you managing this process in your environment and with your clients?

Any examples, best practices, or personal experiences will likely be helpful. I'm also interested to learn about any additional tools or add-ons that could assist us in managing and streamlining this process.

Thank you in advance for your guidance and support!

Thanks,Pradyp

entry.title: SAP Work Zone and SAP Screen Personas
entry.content:
Hi Work Zone experts,

Just a quick question regarding Work Zone content provided by SAP systems (such as WDA or SAP GUI) where SAP Screen Personas has been installed. If the transaction or app has been modified by SAP Screen Personas will this modified content and the Personas editor appear when accessing SAP content via Work Zone (assuming the user has the appropriate authorisations)?

Thanks,

Steve

entry.title: Blog Posts behavoiur: why sometimes they open in full page and sometimes in a layer window?
entry.content:
Hello,

Do you know why there's a difference in behavoiur?

I am adding a Content Widget in an already created workspace in Work Zone advanced edition and when the user tries to open it, it opens in a full page.


If I look at an old workspace created last month I see that when the user tries to open a content via the content widget it opens in a layer.

Could you please help me understanding this behaviour?

Thank you in andvance.

entry.title: Transport of Launchpad personalization data from one subaccount to another
entry.content:
Hello,

Are the users personalizations exported when transporting/exporting a Launchpad site, created in SAP build workzone from one subaccount to another?

entry.title: SAP Buildworkzone Launchpad site export
entry.content:
Hello,

When we export a Launchpad site from one subaccount to another, created in SAP Buildworkzone, are the users personalizations data also exported along with the site content?

Thanks.

entry.title: Searching for UI integration Card from SAP Workzone
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using a standard workzone edition and integrated UI cards into it from content packages and exposed using spaces and pages. From the standard search bar can we search for individual integration cards which we exposed? Normally we can search the apps like fiori apps etc from the search bar as below . Want to know if there is any out of box solution or can pointers how can we achieve

Thanks

Uday

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

entry.title: Workzone Advanced - My Workspace template
entry.content:
I know that MY Workspace is a fully personalized space, but customers still want My Workspace to be customized out of the box. What should I do? Or is there a way to use a regular workspace as a personalized space?

Please give me an idea

(If that doesn't work, im also considering methods such as RPA or expedient methods using webhooks and launchpad plugins.)

entry.title: UI Integration card preview - 404 error for destinations
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I have been recently introduced to the world of UI Integration cards for SAP work zone and so far its been pretty easy to use. I have been trying to implement the Component UI Integration Card and whenever i try to preview the card, the destination (sapes5 devcenter) i'm trying to reach always returns with a 404. The setup is as follows below.

destination in btp

manifest.json

request from controller.js

network tab results

Appreciate any tips or hints as to where i might be missing some config or what im doing wrong here. Ive trawled through all the demo's and docs and cant seem to find anything as to why this is happening.

Cheers,

Steve

entry.title: Fiori / Work Zone - Themes are per the Business Units
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement to have custom theming & branding as per business units of the user in SAP Fiori Launchpad and SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition. Going through the blogs, I understood that for Fiori Launchpad, either through implicit enhancement or shell programing, it can be achieved.

Is there any standard way, or through configuration to achieve it?

Thank you.
